name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Bandit class mod for Gaige the Mechromancer. Drops from Terramorphous the Invincible. Built around Fancy Mathematics, Made of Sterner Stuff, Evil Enchantress, Interspersed Outburst, Preshrunk Cyberpunk, Sentry, Ready, Impact, Expertise, Healthy.
notes: Part of a set of Terramorphous-only items. Collecting all of them combines their red text into a short poem.

special.description: At max level, Gaige's Slayer Of Terramorphous grants: Burn Damage +37% Ignite Chance +37% Health +1,101,229
